ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Cabba's Awakening'; figure matches Cabba's canonical look (light battle suit, dark hair, Universe 6 Saiyan leaping/awakening pose); Special Trait: Saiyan; card is Era: God of Destruction Champa Arc, where Cabba is the primary Universe 6 Saiyan fighter. Dragon Ball Official site (en.dragon-ball-official.com) confirms Cabba's awakening to Super Saiyan occurs in his tournament match against Vegeta — the card title directly names this event.

trivia_bullets.text: Galactic Battle (DBS-B01) was the first booster set for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released July 28, 2017. The set's 114-card roster spans multiple arcs including the God of Destruction Champa Arc (Universe 6 Saiyans) and the Broly Saga. Cabba appears here in the Champa Arc pool as a Universe 6 representative. [WebSearch: PSA Set Registry Galactic Battle 2017; WebSearch: dbs-cardgame.com BT1-027]
sources: WebSearch: PSA Set Registry Galactic Battle 2017

trivia_bullets.text: Cabba is a Saiyan from Universe 6's Planet Sadala, introduced in Dragon Ball Super Chapter 8 (God of Destruction Champa Arc). He is a member of the Sadala Defense Forces and achieves his Super Saiyan transformation during his tournament bout against Vegeta — Vegeta provokes Cabba's rage by threatening to destroy Planet Sadala, unlocking the form. The card title 'Cabba's Awakening' directly commemorates this breakthrough. [en.dragon-ball-official.com: Weekly Character Showcase #9 Cabba]

BT1-027 is a red Extra card (Common, 0 energy cost) with an [Auto] skill granting one of your red cards +6000 power for the duration of a battle. The zero-cost buff makes it a tempo card for red aggro builds in the opening set. [WebSearch: CoreTCG BT1-027; WebSearch: BigOrbitCards BT1-027]

A design detail confirmed by the Dragon Ball Official site: Cabba's battle suit matches the style of old Saiyan armor from Universe 7 in the pre-Frieza Force era. Vegeta explicitly remarks on this during their fight, noting that Cabba's armor resembles what Saiyans wore before being conscripted into the Frieza Force — a visual bridge between the two universes' Saiyan heritage. [en.dragon-ball-official.com: Weekly Character Showcase #9 Cabba, Trivia section]
